title: Practice Exercises
description: Extra practice: rectangles, layering, and opacity.

flashcards.definition: Draw order still matters, but opacity lets you see shapes underneath.
flashcards.example: # Draw circle first, then a translucent rectangle on top

quiz.prompt: If a rectangle is drawn after a circle, where is the rectangle?
quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: later shapes are on top.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: Draw order matters: later shapes appear on top.
